arena-557.title: Fix CI subprocess test hangs
arena-557.author: xyao-nv
arena-557.notes: Follow-up #3: single doc-only change - added note in dexsuite_lift evaluation docs that Newton-trained model fails to grasp/lift cube when evaluated with PhysX. No code changes, no issues.

isaaclab-5214.title: Adds initial support for the Kamino solver
isaaclab-5214.author: AntoineRichard
isaaclab-5214.notes: Follow-up: 4 new commits since initial review (dynamics_preconditioning added, config refactored to to_solver_config(), stale MuJoCo-only comments fixed, deferred graph warm-up fix). Default tolerances mismatch (1e-6 defaults vs 1e-4 presets) and graph conditionals concerns from prior review not addressed but already communicated. No new issues in latest changes.
